film.title: Hits
film.overview: A talentless teen will do anything to get on TV's "The Voice." Meanwhile, her father, a municipal worker, creates an uproar when a video of his rants at City Hall goes viral.

dialogues.dialogue: - Time. - We have pot... we have potholes.  Time. Thank you, Mr. Stuben.  Well, and I think it's a crying shame, Ms. Casserta,  and you should table this.  You and Mr. Hurlickson should table this,
Last night.  And this was at a meeting?  It's a crying shame, Ms. Casserta,  and you should table this.  You and Mr. Hurlickson... No.

Yeah, b*****s!  I'm a veteran of two wars, and I can tell you,  the Founding Fathers would be ashamed of our behavior.  They would laugh at us.  Adding a stop sign at the corner of Dumont and Crawford
